name: Jennifer Carroll Foy
subject: about tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
body:
| | |
I wanted to take a moment to share some of what I said in the debate tonight.

This moment calls for something new. It calls for someone who has walked in Virginians’ shoes, knows their struggles, and has been effective at solving their challenges. I’m confident I’m the right candidate for this moment.

**Republicans have selected their nominee: Glenn Youngkin. The status quo can’t beat him. If we’re going to win, we have to nominate someone who will inspire a broad coalition of voters -- and polling shows that my opponent isn’t energizing Democratic voters enough to beat Glenn Youngkin.**

We need to elect someone who can bring bold, transformational change to Virginia. Someone who will inspire a working mom to stand in line at her polling place to cast her ballot and who doesn’t just have a record of solving Virginia’s challenges in the legislature, but who has actually lived through them.

I have lived on minimum wage -- which is why, as Delegate, I fought hard for (and passed) raising the minimum wage.

I have lived without healthcare, and many of my loved ones have, too. It’s why I’m proud that we expanded Medicaid to over 500,000 Virginians.

My family has been hit hard by this pandemic, just as many working families across Virginia have. It’s why I’m the right leader to build a strong post-COVID economy for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected

**With your help and support, we can and will elect new leadership for our state -- and we will make history by electing the first Black woman to serve as governor nationwide.[Donate now and power my campaign through the final week before the primary.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yItEt7UQpuYeCalSemnTXD-m8piNgU1Gi8bNlAUiDgSeVCd-kr02yXzAIc_wXnZShB4k6NWKfPwieT-4qhfKhT5gJCnirY64jPNnHwsAo8UuZpg8D8zPhJjgkcCG9T51JYw_cWmnEN2t3WQFu8pHoyI0iLiVrakr_VH2EHuHTXC1Hc88NmIqU0uSKHUwatu6STYtQT8s5gSpCPft5-2Epm_zS6X1V_Kfu0jz1IcOCmMTIZXui1jm5NlYE_g0-R1QUHg-cFxqdtNMf5ch-G7ILJfGrt2ZILLgNYEgeAvLa8kw/3cf/gC-_egS9SNChqe9yhu-Uig/h0/o92ZBNnZFWPnlvrfQxEU7zNfhHEGeTJchVfdPFNKR_8)**

To be big and bold, we need to elect a bold new leader who puts Virginia first, not one who is part of the broken status quo. Be big and bold now by donating to this historic campaign.

[DONATE NOW](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yItEt7UQpuYeCalSemnTXD-m8piNgU1Gi8bNlAUiDgSeVCd-kr02yXzAIc_wXnZShB4k6NWKfPwieT-4qhfKhTCpuDUTCiD4sVY0G0mI5MOvyorWYNOpBSodKz1-Lt28yQyXyXtAQUgM5Lwuyb7fhnN-gHREZRlg6GRIbL0OU0v-T7wYY9Vb1JnWCs6bXznXblxk9YKw60_Y9a-E7xSLHPdRNG3Vs048vbqqI5cl9C-zK0ugTNiJYJS6zef5ZkPdcFbDIUdJFuxYfXRV7trpY3Ixdj68LAZn1ABMSw0utZUg/3cf/gC-_egS9SNChqe9yhu-Uig/h1/YKnqwGf2N-w0OLtHCS3ELYNdvELHTsm-MfHC6_fqDbg)
Let’s go win!

Jennifer

* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. Donate now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_7DmAt5nfMM7QFvx_QNiBNONmVtICnvGiz4ZKs_qG7Zfw4oaKV8pTKPdAsb3VN5_Bh73lWki93nG0RUyySk6zkTRBWLykLOh_ikrEg1x5MDumN59OQMMOpUq7WMyecW6eV4hB2OezaklKD60eFN02ghw5M6S5mkkDx9IRul0AO2v6uf1lNoDJHXkjA4Iih9Sn2K_U7--CbVfYkkrDJZB528GZLYajee-LNpj8j6ruFFZ03gFHxfEI3IXuz65g-7RdZX0nGOI8ZMGipvhdckM1/3cf/gC-_egS9SNChqe9yhu-Uig/h2/be9x2zi4HqAWKKdoTwrVBKwck3PYXEuZbyDFEMLqLKU)**_ [CONTRIBUTE](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_7DmAt5nfMM7QFvx_QNiBNONmVtICnvGiz4ZKs_qG7Zfw4oaKV8pTKPdAsb3VN5_pXkWAZF1xX_YPR-e_nM-xsMzwmhzFMlK0z2hbrgzKa5_Ad5LCvu4rZXe8bwOY9JFhOy4e6VEhJ_lD3Ee_EuwLnI4dPDgzuoUgbiMknvMn5zlIB8SdVuaC6q7JbVycdWeTg_c-NH114VBT0mmsuto2eHGcflUBCtxp46Vy_0GZ-jpDzCMClyv5JxxBD54t5Tlsd_pY7zKArwvnuL_3n81m/3cf/gC-_egS9SNChqe9yhu-Uig/h3/RXl5Et3J-uFH4ooX3gFTYbST36Hmj_MXq1cSVilwR-A) | Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: I want to thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Peter,

Last night, we faced our end-of-month deadline and we set a goal to help us protect my seat and our narrow Democratic House majority. Well, this grassroots team stepped up in a huge way, and thanks to your support -- we reached our goal!

**Thank you, Peter.** Your support means so much to me, and I'm grateful to have you by my side.

With a new opponent in the race and dark money attacks against me already starting, I know our work is only just beginning. We have a tough road ahead if we're going to protect our Democratic House majority and keep me working in Congress on the issues that matter most to you.

It won't be easy, but this grassroots team has helped us beat the odds before. Thanks to your support, we flipped Washington's 8th District blue for the first time ever in 2018, and we kept it blue in 2020. I know if we continue working together, we can beat the odds again and protect my seat and the Democratic House majority.

Thank you,

Kim

**National Republicans have named Rep. Kim Schrier's district a top target for the midterms, so we need your help to build another winning campaign. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022?** | [DONATE](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d947b/72735be7/3086a8b1/1e100868/1670372151/VEsH/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-june-2021?gpsid=8_30_19154&refcode=em21_210601_eomty_fnd_gq_act__ks_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210601_eomty_fnd_gq_act__ks_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&utm_content=1+-+DONATE")

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: It's Now or Never Again
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=it_s_now_or_never_again&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **It all comes down to the next 30 days. Will Gazelka and Republicans force Walz to capitulate on Emergency Powers or will they Sell Us OUT?!** People are shocked to find out that Governor Walz is still holding onto his Unilateral Emergency Powers. Now that most restrictions are relaxed, they assume the emergency is gone. But Walz won't let go. It's up to Senate Republicans to refuse to pass Governor Walz' budget unless the **Never Again Bill** is passed so that Walz' Emergency Powers are terminated for good. **But they won't do it without you telling them. As July approaches and a partial Government shutdown inches closer, they will Sell YOU Out to the Democrats if they don't hear from you.** You see, Gazelka and Senate Republicans need to know there is a political price to pay if they cut Deals With Democrats before the **Never Again Bill** is passed. We mean business when it comes to Ending Walz' Emergency Powers. Action 4 Liberty has been in the trenches fighting for your liberty against this tyrannical government every day! You helped STOP the Great Gazelka Sellout in May. Without your calls, emails and financial support, the legislature would have passed a budget without demanding an End to the Emergency Powers. So let's DOUBLE DOWN. Please contact your state senator and tell him or her **No Budget Deals with Walz until the Never Again Bill is passed into law**! | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=it_s_now_or_never_again&n=2 "FIND MY SENATOR") [FIND MY SENATOR](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=it_s_now_or_never_again&n=3)
---
**Sample Script**
Sen ______, do not agree to a budget deal with Democrats and Governor Walz without passing the Never Again Bill first. Senate Republicans must stop Walz' further destruction of Minnesota by ensuring he can never unilaterally declare an emergency again. Stop cutting deals with Democrats and pass the Never Again Bill now.
**Alternate Script**
Sen ________, you are a fraud if you pass a budget without passing the Never Again Bill first. I've heard you talk about removing Walz' Emergency Powers, but it sounds like it's all talk - no action. Put your foot down and refuse to pass a budget until the Never Again Bill is passed into law. Do the right thing!
Once you are done contacting your senator, please let me know. Our team will be monitoring things closely as this fight heats up.
Peter, thank you for making the calls, writing the emails and for **[your financial support](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=it_s_now_or_never_again&n=4)**. I can't do it without YOU. I need you in this fight now more than ever!!!
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=it_s_now_or_never_again&n=5).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=it_s_now_or_never_again&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=it_s_now_or_never_again&n=7), software for leaders.

name: Josh Hawley
subject: What is Joe Biden hiding?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57580895:6SyMWulPN:m:1:3103520637:3246C82A6D6813B21266386F7C9D9C56:r "Headline") Peter, Millions of people dead, the world economy in tatters, and it is now becoming clear that one of the worst pandemics in human history may have been caused by Communist China in a lab in Wuhan, China. Those of us who saw this last year were laughed at by the media and dismissed by international organizations like the WHO. **Rather than meet China 's lies with truth, Joe Biden and the press chose to meet those lies with other lies.** **[Someone needs to hold them accountable, and I am working here in Washington to do just that. Will you help me fight to expose the lies and cover-ups?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57580895:6SyMWulPN:m:1:3103520637:3246C82A6D6813B21266386F7C9D9C56:r "Someone needs to hold them accountable, and I am working here in
Washington to do just that. Will you help me fight to expose the lies and cover-ups?")** It is pathetic to watch an American President grovel to a communist dictatorship. Even now, he is pretending to seek out answers but won't say whether he will release what he finds. **_That isn 't good enough._ I am demanding that the intelligence on the cause of Covid-19 be declassified and presented to the American people to judge for themselves.** The American people deserve the truth about the origins of COVID-19. So many of us have been mocked for standing up for what we KNOW to be true. We will never stop so that the families who lost loved ones will have some solace that may help them heal from this tragedy. That is our strength as people and a nation, and it is why we will ultimately win. **[Please do all you can to help me win this battle for the truth and fight Joe Biden's cover-up.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57580895:6SyMWulPN:m:1:3103520637:3246C82A6D6813B21266386F7C9D9C56:r "Please do all you can to help me win this battle for the truth and
fight Joe Biden’s cover-up.")** This fight isn't just about being right - this is about protecting our nation and its people. It's about holding the people responsible for this pandemic accountable--whether they are in China or Americans who actively covered up the truth. Our nation lost hundreds of thousands of moms, dads, sisters, brothers, and other loved ones that may have been avoided. States went on lockdowns, civil liberties were threatened, and businesses were shuttered. American families suffered tremendous hardships. Americans deserve better than to permit Joe Biden's cover-up for his friends in Beijing. **[Will you join me in this fight to expose the truth about the origins of COVID-19?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57580895:6SyMWulPN:m:1:3103520637:3246C82A6D6813B21266386F7C9D9C56:r "Will you join me in this fight to expose the truth about the
origins of COVID-19?")** The left will never give up trying to control every facet of our lives, and they see COVD-19 as the perfect excuse to trample on our inalienable rights. My fight to bring their lies into the sunlight will make me a target., and I need to know who has my back. **[I hope I can count on you to stand me with as you've done every time before.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57580895:6SyMWulPN:m:1:3103520637:3246C82A6D6813B21266386F7C9D9C56:r "I hope I can count on you to stand me with as you’ve done

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Will you be a part of democracy’s story?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
We can make history together

Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30143050/288613463/1793776944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmIzMTVkNy1hYWMzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EAhdiXuXbZMAiPW4MlCyOga-B8naEA7fSrACPeuREvk=&emci=2a1343b3-1ec3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f6b315d7-aac3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1037277)

| | Friend - As more and more Americans get vaccinated and the light at the end of the pandemic tunnel begins to come clearer into vision, many are feeling hope for the first time in a long time.

For a lot of us, this summer will be filled with barbecues, trips to see family and friends along with the chance to hug the people we love for the first time in quite a while. Still, the gravity of too many losses in the past year weighs heavily on us as we balance the relief of a slow return to what we knew before and acceptance that things will never be “normal” again.

As we grapple with this part of our story, the story of our democracy is also still being written and we are at a historic inflection point. **[I am asking you to be a full participant in it today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30143052/288613467/-430032046?refcode=IE060221DEM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmIzMTVkNy1hYWMzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EAhdiXuXbZMAiPW4MlCyOga-B8naEA7fSrACPeuREvk=)**

I don’t have to tell you about what is at stake in our country right now. We are not letting this onslaught go unchallenged.

Today, I am asking you to be a part of democracy’s story. Fair Fight Action is fighting as hard as ever to make sure the voices of the American people are heard, but we cannot do it without you. [**Will you donate however much you can today and double down on your efforts to protect our democracy?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30143056/288613470/-430032046?refcode=IE060221DEM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmIzMTVkNy1hYWMzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EAhdiXuXbZMAiPW4MlCyOga-B8naEA7fSrACPeuREvk=)

Thank you, friend, for being a part of this work. My hope is that as we all start to head into a summer filled with more friends and fun and a renewed sense of hope, we don’t lose track of what is at stake for all of us.

We can’t slow down now.

-Stacey [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30143057/288613475/-430032046?refcode=IE060221DEM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmIzMTVkNy1hYWMzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EAhdiXuXbZMAiPW4MlCyOga-B8naEA7fSrACPeuREvk=) |
---|---|---

subject: Fauci Fired and Investigated
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
FIRE FAUCI NOW! BECOME A CITIZEN COSPONSOR

Peter -- Anthony Fauci must be fired and
investigated!
Schools and churches shut down. Businesses
shuttered. Lives destroyed. America's economy on life support.
Anthony Fauci did everything he could, along
with the Democrats, Big Tech and the Fake News Media to TANK
President Trump's booming economy and remove him from the White
House.

And now, we know Fauci approved American
tax-dollars to fund "research" at the Wuhan lab!
Fauci misled the American people and we
Americans can no longer afford Fauci's Pandemic Reign of Terror.
Fauci is out of control and must be FIRED!

FIRE FAUCI NOW! BECOME A CITIZEN COSPONSOR
Fauci has been wrong at nearly every turn
about the China Virus. His actions have resulted in misery for
millions of Americans.
The bill I introduced today, the "Fire Fauci
Act," reduces his salary to $0 (he's the highest-paid federal
employee in the country -- more than POTUS) and increases
transparency for the NIAID office in what they knew, when they
knew it, and how they responded.
Become a Citizen Cosponsor to DEFUND and FIRE
FAUCI!

-- Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

for Congress

subject: Join me and special guests tonight at 8pm ET / 5pm PT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Friends:

Thanks to you and the VIPs — our Volunteers In Politics — our candidate, Melanie Stansbury, won a decisive victory in the New Mexico special election last night!

House Democrats are proud of her win and look forward to welcoming her expertise on the issues essential to Build Back Better.

Our work For The People continues.

On Pride Month and ahead of Gun Violence Awareness Day, please join me and some very special guests today June 2 at 8pm ET / 5pm PT. Sign up for our visual event here. >> us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_qjXyi0tkSxGpCKWMchqmow

With so much at stake, our unity will be essential for the work ahead.

Thank you for all you do,

NANCY

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.

As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.

We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.

Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: 🌈 It’s Pride Month! 🌈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Happy Pride Month! 🌈🌈🌈
This Pride Month is my first as a member of Congress — something that, until recently, I never believed possible for me as an openly gay, Black man. This movement made that possible and made history.
**[I’m fighting in Congress to make this country a better, safer place for LGBTQ+ people everywhere -- but if I’m going to stay in this fight, I need your help. To kick off Pride Month, can you make a contribution to my campaign today? Every dollar you give will make a huge impact for our movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30149309/288637154/-799468273?refcode2=449fd96e-b9c3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210602-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDlmZDk2ZS1iOWMzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=etnoXggfEIzuUYe0H1GUUjRFH7QalOJ1SXnTw02CCnc=)**
During Pride, we celebrate how far the LGBTQ+ community has come, but we also remember the struggles it took to get here and the obstacles yet to be overcome.
Pride is a commemoration of the Stonewall Riots. In late June 1969, police conducted a raid at the Stonewall Inn — a bar that was one of the few safe havens for the LGBTQ+ community in New York City — and started arresting people for dressing in a way that wasn’t in alignment with gender norms. This was legal at the time. We would not have Pride today if not for heroes like Marsha P. Johnson, who fought back against the people conducting the raid.
Today, LGBTQ+ folks have freedoms that were unimaginable back then, but also still face many of the same issues. We can't mark Pride without addressing the crisis of violence against trans people in America.
The LGBTQ+ community also disproportionately has student debt and lacks health insurance, and it is still legal under federal law to be discriminated against on the basis of sexual orientation and gender identity.
So this Pride Month, as we proudly parade in the streets, may we also recommit to our fight for justice and equality for the whole LGBTQ+ community. None of us are free until we are all free to live and love how we choose. **[If you can afford to, please make a contribution to my re-election campaign, so I can keep up the fight in Congress for full LGBTQ+ equality.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30149312/288637158/-799468273?refcode2=449fd96e-b9c3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210602-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDlmZDk2ZS1iOWMzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=etnoXggfEIzuUYe0H1GUUjRFH7QalOJ1SXnTw02CCnc=)**
Thank you for your ongoing support! 🌈🌈🌈
Onward,
Mondaire
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30149314/288637160/-254107743?refcode2=449fd96e-b9c3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210602-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDlmZDk2ZS1iOWMzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=etnoXggfEIzuUYe0H1GUUjRFH7QalOJ1SXnTw02CCnc=)**

subject: Broadband access for ALL Hoosiers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Thanks to the GOP in Indiana, more and more Hoosiers will have access to broadband. Read more >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470530?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | Hoosier Republican,

Thanks to the hard work and leadership of Governor Holcomb and Republican legislators, we’re actively working to expand broadband access to more rural areas of Indiana.

One thing we learned during the Covid-19 pandemic is the importance of high quality, affordable broadband access. In school and in the workplace — all Hoosiers need to be connected to the information superhighway.

Indiana is investing $250 million to expand broadband access, which is the largest single state investment in broadband. By the time the program is expanded, more Hoosiers will have access to affordable, quality connectivity regardless of where they live, work, or go to school.

We couldn’t have made it happen without the leadership of the governor and our Republican supermajorities in the General Assembly. If you’re proud of the work they are doing to improve life for all Hoosiers, please chip in now to help us keep going.
---
| [SUPPORT HOOSIER REPUBLICANS NOW >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e6f5ecde88&e=1acd9bb3d6 "SUPPORT HOOSIER REPUBLICANS NOW >>")
---
| We’re proud of the work that Hoosier Republicans are doing and we know that we can keep making Indiana one of the best places in the U.S. to live, work, and play.

But we can’t do it without your continued support. [Please make a sustaining donation today](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=28f86e1beb&e=1acd9bb3d6).

Thanks for your help,
Kyle Hupfer IN GOP

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Weeding Out the Schemers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
From the moment Joe Biden took the oath of office on January 20, you and I have known what we're up against.
| | | [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/5XPMplWQjWgUNhvar8S4Ag/8vCaJ7l3eqg49orTCwAUZg) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, House Freedom Fund.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/5XPMplWQjWgUNhvar8S4Ag/8vCaJ7l3eqg49orTCwAUZg)**.
---

---
| | |
---
Fellow American:

From the moment Joe Biden took the oath of office on January 20, you and I have known what we're up against. After Biden's recent speech to Congress, _EVERYONE_ knows.

Now that he's in power, all the phony promises of "unity" have been thrown overboard. It's crystal clear now that Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi want to advance the most radical, socialistic agenda in our lifetime:

❌ Amnesty for millions of illegal immigrants;
❌ Gun control and confiscation;
❌ Racist indoctrination of students and workers;
❌ Crackdowns on conservatives' freedom of speech and religion; and
❌ Making "wokeness" America's state religion.

_**The House of Representatives is the front line in the fight for America 's soul. It is the fight - right here, right now - that the House Freedom Fund was created to win.**_

For too long, conservatives had to ask establishment Republicans in The Swamp to fight for our principles and our country. They never did.

**[Now, we have a caucus of conservatives who listen to their voters and are working to stop the progressive Left. But we need your help to increase our numbers!](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/5XPMplWQjWgUNhvar8S4Ag/8vCaJ7l3eqg49orTCwAUZg)**

The 2022 election cycle is now underway, and the outlook is very promising. Democrat voters were nowhere to be found in the recent special election primary in TX-06 where no Democrat finished in the top two and now have no candidate on the ballot for the general election. With a highly motived voter base, Republicans are positioned to gain seats in the mid-term elections next year.

The only question is, _**what kind of Republicans?**_

We know what kind the Washington establishment wants: elitist, globalist, accommodating, and scared of the Left. We can't let them decide! HFF's mission is to Make the House Great Again with tough conservatives who stick to their principles.

**[Please support the House Freedom Fund today!](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/5XPMplWQjWgUNhvar8S4Ag/8vCaJ7l3eqg49orTCwAUZg)**

HFF puts candidates through the most intensive interview process in American politics - weeding out the schemers, climbers, and appeasers. HFF doesn't support career politicians. It supports HEROES. And when they do, these candidates win.

In the 2020 election cycle, HFF invested more than $16 million into 52 House races, and helped 44 candidates win. That's an 85% winning percentage, even in a year when Republicans lost the House!

Today, HFF's favorite candidates have become the STRONGEST members of Congress. Leaders like Andy Biggs, Lauren Boebert, Scott Perry, Byron Donalds, and others.

**[HFF is taking back the Republican Party from Big Business, Big Tech, and Big Government politicians.](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/5XPMplWQjWgUNhvar8S4Ag/8vCaJ7l3eqg49orTCwAUZg)**

HFF's job right now is to identify and recruit real fighters from coast to coast and then pour resources into their races to make sure the next Republican majority is committed to making America great again.

HFF is the only organization exclusively dedicated to winning the House of Representatives not for a party or an interest but **patriots** like **YOU**. With your help, we can elect a new class of lawmakers who will fight to:

✅ Build the border wall;
✅ Re-open America's schools and economy;
✅ Protect girls' sports from woke insanity;
✅ Protect the Second Amendment from gun-grabbers; and
✅ Take on Big Tech's woke-capital abuse.

**We can win these fights, but we can 't do it without you.**

**[Please join me today in supporting the House Freedom Fund with a generous contribution to invest in the future of our movement and the survival of our country.](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/5XPMplWQjWgUNhvar8S4Ag/8vCaJ7l3eqg49orTCwAUZg)**

We need you. We need _EVERYONE_.

Sincerely,
JIM JORDAN
U.S. Congressman, R-Ohio
|
---
|
---
| [ELECT CONSERVATIVES](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/5XPMplWQjWgUNhvar8S4Ag/8vCaJ7l3eqg49orTCwAUZg "ELECT CONSERVATIVES")
---

---
|
---
House Freedom Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003

House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that promote the liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.

Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year.

name: Hala Ayala
subject: An explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hala for Virginia
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30157521/288655642/40582973?refcode=hla-em-210602-lme&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTYyNjE2MS1jNGMzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FdFqSi_9cLRsAvgdia0djFdxNob1cJztE8A--AsMbhQ=&emci=04626161-c4c3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=05626161-c4c3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18668076)
---
Peter — In just a moment, **[I’m going to ask you to make a contribution toward my campaign for Lt. Governor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30157522/288655643/1546086982?refcode=hla-em-210602-lme&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTYyNjE2MS1jNGMzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FdFqSi_9cLRsAvgdia0djFdxNob1cJztE8A--AsMbhQ=)** But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain why this request is so important — especially today. I was 24 and working at a gas station when I found out I was pregnant — and I didn’t have access to health care. For my son and I, Medicaid saved our lives. After my son was born, I worked hard to complete my degree and got a job as a cyber security specialist with the Department of Homeland Security. But still, I found myself struggling to put food on the table and keep a roof over my family’s head. My story isn’t unique. Too many Virginians have been left out by the system that keeps working families like mine on the menu while folks at the top sit comfortably at the table. So, I threw my hat in the ring and ran for office to change that. I was elected to the House of Delegates in 2017 and I’m so proud of what we’ve accomplished for working families since then — from finally ratifying the Equal Rights Amendment to expanding Medicaid for 500,000 Virginians to abolishing the death penalty to legalizing marijuana. But still, many Virginia families are struggling in the wake of this public health crisis to afford prescriptions and put food on the table. There is still so much work ahead of us. **Peter, I’m asking for your support today because I believe that I can continue to build on our progressive agenda and make a difference for so many working families as Virginia’s next Lt. Governor. So, will you chip in $10 or whatever you can afford toward our campaign? I can’t do it without you.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30157523/288655644/1546086982?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=hla-em-210602-lme&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTYyNjE2MS1jNGMzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FdFqSi_9cLRsAvgdia0djFdxNob1cJztE8A--AsMbhQ=)

clean_body: | Peter — In just a moment, = But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain why this request is so important — especially today. I was 24 and working at a gas station when I found out I was pregnant — and I didn’t have access to health care. For my son and I, Medicaid saved our lives. After my son was born, I worked hard to complete my degree and got a job as a cyber security specialist with the Department of Homeland Security. But still, I found myself struggling to put food on the table and keep a roof over my family’s head. My story isn’t unique. Too many Virginians have been left out by the system that keeps working families like mine on the menu while folks at the top sit comfortably at the table. So, I threw my hat in the ring and ran for office to change that. I was elected to the House of Delegates in 2017 and I’m so proud of what we’ve accomplished for working families since then — from finally ratifying the Equal Rights Amendment to expanding Medicaid for 500,000 Virginians to abolishing the death penalty to legalizing marijuana. But still, many Virginia families are struggling in the wake of this public health crisis to afford prescriptions and put food on the table. There is still so much work ahead of us. Peter, I’m asking for your support today because I believe that I can continue to build on our progressive agenda and make a difference for so many working families as Virginia’s next Lt. Governor. So, will you chip in $10 or whatever you can afford toward our campaign? I can’t do it without you. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for reading and chipping in, if you can. Election Day is less than a week away, so your support couldn’t be more important right now. name: Megan Simpson, Team Sarah
subject: re: extended deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Hey Peter,

In case you missed it, we fell short on our May fundraising goal. But we're determined not to let this setback define our campaign. That's why we extended our deadline to Saturday at midnight to reach our $15,000 goal.

A lot of you have already stepped up to meet this new challenge after Sarah's last email, but we're not quite there yet. This is our chance to make up lost ground, so I have to ask:

**[Can Sarah count on your support before our extended end-of-month deadline on Saturday? As Sarah's campaign manager, it's my job to build a winning campaign so we can say goodbye to Ron Johnson once and for all. The thing is, we can't execute our plan without resources to pay for things like a tank of gas, digital ads, yard signs, bumper stickers, staff -- you name it. And when we fall short, we have to think about making budget cuts.

Unlike Ron Johnson, we don't have a warchest of corporate PAC money to tap into. We don't have a rolodex full of right-wing megadonors we can dial up to cut a big check. Instead, we're counting on grassroots supporters like you to turn our plans into a reality. It's not the easy way to do things, but it's the right way.

**[Peter, will you chip in $10 to our campaign for U.S. Senate to ensure we can meet our ambitious goal by the extended deadline? name: NH GOP
subject: Nevada Democrats want to take away our First In the Nation primary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
Harry Reid has spearheaded a Democrat push to move Nevada to First in the Nation

| | | | | [](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdonate-to-defend-fitn/1/01000179ccf3b7f2-547ba22a-5a2c-4a62-bc4e-18a092b47961-000000/n64Li3kVSmC88yV5zeFvqRFq9Nc=216)
---
| | Derek,

Democrats in Nevada have passed a law to move their state to the First in the Nation. In a push spearheaded by former Democratic Senator Harry Reid and other far-left advocacy groups, _Nevada has moved to usurp New Hampshire as the first state to hold their Presidential Primary_.

[Link to Article Here](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.wmur.com%2Farticle%2Fnevada-bill-presidential-primary-2024%2F36593072/1/01000179ccf3b7f2-547ba22a-5a2c-4a62-bc4e-18a092b47961-000000/RZIWFGh1ELYCZY8-qqPqPSj5qg0=216)

We need to step up in order to defend our First in the Nation primary, and call on our Federal Delegation to oppose this push. New Hampshire Republicans will always stand with Secretary of State Bill Gardner to defend our First in the Nation Primary.
[
Can you contribute today to help us Defend our FITN Primary?](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdonate-to-defend-fitn/2/01000179ccf3b7f2-547ba22a-5a2c-4a62-bc4e-18a092b47961-000000/h04sft8CcKw4It5ZR6iJzktHmSE=216)

Our Federal Delegation has left the door open to ending the New Hampshire FITN primary with their support of HR1, and their failure to call out Nevada Democrats' overreach. It's time for us to hold them accountable.

[Can we count on your support to Defend our First in the Nation Primary?](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdonate-to-defend-fitn/3/01000179ccf3b7f2-547ba22a-5a2c-4a62-bc4e-18a092b47961-000000/w-eV-rCPGm7ly4gBO2yvZUWV22U=216)

name: Team Navarre
subject: Become a sustaining donor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,
We wanted to thank you for all you’ve done in these first two months of the campaign. Our momentum is growing and it is because of folks like you.
The key to scaling and sustaining a winning campaign is a strong grassroots movement. We’re off to a great start, but we can’t lose steam heading into the summer months.
So today, we’re creating the Sustaining Donors Program. We’re asking for 500 people to sign up for a monthly, recurring donation to help us open an office, bring on staff, and continue to run digital ads. If you can give $20 each month, please do, but Stewart recognizes that may not be possible for everyone. Any amount that you’re able to commit to Stewart each month is greatly appreciated. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn?refcode=210602-email&recurring=true&amount=20]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn?refcode=210602-email&express_lane=true&amount=10] DONATE $25 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn?refcode=210602-email&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn?refcode=210602-email&express_lane=true&amount=50] DONATE $100 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn?refcode=210602-email&express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE $250 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn?refcode=210602-email&express_lane=true&amount=250] ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn?refcode=210602-email]
Even if you’re only able to give $5 each month, it all adds up and has a really important impact on our campaign.
Click here to make a recurring monthly donation of any amount. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn?refcode=210602-email&recurring=true]
We are so thankful for whatever you can give.
-- Team Navarre
PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
Stewart Navarre for Congress
PO Box 150
Fredericksburg, VA 22404
United States

Jahana has been laser-focused on her work in Congress, helping pass the American Rescue Plan to rebuild our economy and boost vaccine distribution. And she’s determined to ensure that this recovery is sustained and equitable, so our communities can thrive in the long term.
**But on the campaign side, we cannot ignore the fact that there is an election coming up – especially now that the national GOP has ramped up their divisive, political spin-doctoring campaign against her.**
Jahana’s district is a “frontline” district, meaning it is one of the most competitive in the nation. We have seen super PACs spending and desperate attacks come our way before, and we are ready for them again.
[**It is your support that will allow us to get ahead and stay ahead – keeping the facts in front of the people. Donate today to help us get the message out!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30161281/288668689/1522229062?refcode=E8922-20210602-JuneKickoff1-SL-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-NationalRepublicanOrg-EG&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTk0MzA4ZS1kMGMzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JfrRL6O4VWyfN3oEGsLTB6gOyi45dsxibNqHSs78j6I=)
Thank you,
– Team Hayes

clean_body: The National Republican Campaign Committee (NRCC) just launched a five-figure digital, radio and billboard campaign against a handful of Democrats in “toss-up” districts – and Jahana is on this shortlist. Take a look: | | Hi, we’re kicking off the last month of this quarter, and we’ve got company. Here’s the latest: The National Republican Campaign Committee (NRCC) just launched a five-figure digital, radio and billboard campaign against a handful of Democrats in “toss-up” districts – and Jahana is on this shortlist. Take a look: = These latest ads are in addition to a recent ad blitz by industry groups spending to get their message out in the 5th District – to the tune of $4 million in TV, digital advertising and phone calls. This all reinforces our need to get the facts and Jahana’s work out in front of voters here in CT-05. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Jahana has been laser-focused on her work in Congress, helping pass the American Rescue Plan to rebuild our economy and boost vaccine distribution. And she’s determined to ensure that this recovery is sustained and equitable, so our communities can thrive in the long term. But on the campaign side, we cannot ignore the fact that there is an election coming up – especially now that the national GOP has ramped up their divisive, political spin-doctoring campaign against her. Jahana’s district is a “frontline” district, meaning it is one of the most competitive in the nation. We have seen super PACs spending and desperate attacks come our way before, and we are ready for them again. = Thank you, – Team Hayes = * Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. | Friend

New Hampshire is one of the most razor-close swing states in the nation -- and one of the last stands in the fight against the radical left.

That's why I started LFOD PAC ("Live Free or Die" PAC)--- To defeat the radical left in Washington so that we can protect our values and to stop the growing influence from the Communist Party of China. The only way to do that is to win in New Hampshire.

Here's how LFOD PAC (_" Live Free or Die"_ PAC) will turn it RED in 2022 and 2024:
* **DEFEAT** radical leftist **Senator Maggie Hassan** (she won by _just 1,000 votes_ last time) and **Pelosi-Puppet Congressman Chris Pappas**

* **DEFENDING** the **election integrity** of New Hampshire's **first-in-the-nation electoral system**

* **FIGHT BACK **against the radical left in Washington.

Fact is, the **future of the conservative movement** depends on making swing states RED. It's been done in Florida. It's been done it in the Midwest. **_[Now, we've got to do it in New Hampshire too.](http://click.e.santosforcongressemail.com/?qs=8fbe8effff5b4712ac973d6552df3007d5d6ededb2f2eeebd540f45fda5afa0570d5f921a91359e930f89c10488b74e72957fbc1ba5bb36ee455aff0b638e9c0 "Now, we’ve got to do it in New Hampshire too.")_**

subject: These 35 traitors need to lose
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DRAIN THE DC SWAMP PAC
body:
Bye Felicia! |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=ccda6763b1&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots changing Congress, [with your help](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=f657c69eff&e=ba6e67b849)!

**One of the biggest travesties of a very bad Congress is the vote for political persecution of America First patriots - the "Truth Commission". **

Whenever the Soviets had a "truth commission", it was always a pretext to settle scores against political enemies and COVER UP THE TRUTH, not investigate it.

Nancy Pelosi held the vote last week on creating a "Commission" to investigate the January 6 events at the Capitol. Every Democrat voted for it, proving that there are no "moderate Democrats".

What was enraging was that 35 RINOs joined her.

The text of the bill shows the intent! It starts out with a judgement, calling January 6 a __**‘domestic terrorist attack on the Capitol’.**__

Well, if they are starting off by calling it that, there is no need to investigate, is there? They already came to a conclusion- _and that conclusion was the most lopsided farce they could think of._

Make no mistake, they want to pin all America First patriots as "domestic terrorists". They just needed to give themselves a fig leaf.

Here's what I say: it wasn't an insurrection. You can't have an insurrection by people who were not armed. You can't have an insurrection when the Constitution guarantees the "right of assembly for the redress of grievances".

_Then again, some RINOs never cared about the Constitution. For them, like Paul Ryan and John Boehner, it was always about "Orange Man Bad", and trying to attack President Trump's supporters._
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=399fe71409&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **But for most of these RINOs, it was not their first offense.**

Voted for January 6th Commission and voted to impeach Trump:
Anthony Gonzalez of Ohio
Fred Upton of Michigan
Adam Kinzinger of Illinois
Jaime Herrera Beutler of Washington
John Katko of New York
Dan Newhouse of Washington
Tom Rice of South Carolina
Liz Cheney of Wyoming
Peter Meijer of Michigan

Voted for January 6th Commission and voted for Democrat gun control.
Maria Elvira Salazar of Florida
Carlos Gimenez of Florida
Brian Fitzpatrick of Pennsylvania
Andrew Garbarino of New York
Chris Smith of New Jersey

Voted for January 6th Commission and voted to remove Marjorie Taylor Greene from committees:
Maria Elvira Salazar of Florida
Carlos Gimenez of Florida
Brian Fitzpatrick of Pennsylvania
Chris Smith of New Jersey
Fred Upton of Michigan
Adam Kinzinger of Illinois
John Katko of New York
Chris Jacobs of New York

They think you'll never notice. They think you'll never remember their bad votes. So it's up to us to SHOW them that we noticed!

**_If we don't make an example of them, they will never get it_ \- and they will keep on betraying their voters and their country. We have to make them feel the pain, politically.**
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=3ffe39ac00&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **We need Republicans in Congress to fight for US, and against the radical Democrats. The ones fighting us don't want to fight the Dems, because they AGREE with Pelosi and AOC! [Help us show them the light!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=9145552b4c&e=ba6e67b849)**

Politicians will lie to us and lie to us until we hold them accountable! [Your $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or $1,000 donation is c](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=47cc5ef9be&e=ba6e67b849)[rucial to holding Congress accountable!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=68f0f29c4e&e=ba6e67b849)

The Swamp never liked conservatives of principle. They distrust us, which is why they look down on us. Don't let them get away with it!

[Donate now.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=7bc38a1090&e=ba6e67b849)

Respectfully,
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=cac4a14c1d&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| Christopher Ekstrom
Businessman
America First Donor

P.S. Much to my personal shame there were TWO TEXANS who voted wrong: Rep. VAN TAYLOR of TX-03 & Rep. Tony Gonzales of TX-23. There is no excuse for these two RINO SWAMP creatures to be returned to Congress. Help me return Taylor & Gonzales to private life in ‘22!

clean_body: | | | | | DESANTIS PROTECTS WOMENS SPORTS, REJECTS PRESSURE FROM WOKE CORPORATIONS | Governor Ron DeSantis joined Tucker Carlson to discuss The Fairness in Women's Sports Act. This law will help ensure women and girls aren't discriminated against in athletic competition by being forced to compete against biological males. Our female athletes deserve a level playing field and are entitled to the opportunity to pursue their dreams in contests that have integrity. | | Governor DeSantis is doing what is right and has continued to prove that he won't be cowed by corporate and media pressure. He will NEVER allow woke corporations to dictate the policies in Florida - not now, not ever. Because of Governor DeSantis' leadership - Florida will STAND STRONG and PROTECT women's sports and opportunities. name: Flip CA-25
subject: 4 years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30164410/288680494/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjIxNzk3Ny1kY2MzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xbxx0R9qcl6701Z1Lw85aiErG_JotYv3R2uzl1PHKNY=&emci=45217977-dcc3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4b217977-dcc3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=11385749)

Peter --

Four years ago, Donald Trump pulled our country out of the Paris Climate Accord, taking away years of crucial progress in the fight against climate change.

**However, since President Biden took office, we’ve come a long way towards erasing this shame -- and have rejoined the international community in the Paris Accord.**

But to combat everything Trump did over his administration, we need a Congress willing to take action -- not one mired in partisan squabbling, just like Mike Garcia is trying to promote.

**[That’s why we need to flip CA-25 and elect Christy Smith, who will work _for_ the people, _for_ this country to get things done. name: Jennifer Carroll Foy
subject: about last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
body:
| | |
I wanted to take a moment to share some of what I said in the debate last night.

This moment calls for something new. It calls for someone who has walked in Virginians’ shoes, knows their struggles, and has been effective at solving their challenges. I’m confident I’m the right candidate for this moment.

**Republicans have selected their nominee: Glenn Youngkin. The status quo can’t beat him. If we’re going to win, we have to nominate someone who will inspire a broad coalition of voters -- and polling shows that my opponent isn’t energizing Democratic voters enough to beat Glenn Youngkin.**

We need to elect someone who can bring bold, transformational change to Virginia. Someone who will inspire a working mom to stand in line at her polling place to cast her ballot and who doesn’t just have a record of solving Virginia’s challenges in the legislature, but who has actually lived through them.

I have lived on minimum wage -- which is why, as Delegate, I fought hard for (and passed) raising the minimum wage.

I have lived without healthcare, and many of my loved ones have, too. It’s why I’m proud that we expanded Medicaid to over 500,000 Virginians.

My family has been hit hard by this pandemic, just as many working families across Virginia have. It’s why I’m the right leader to build a strong post-COVID economy for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected

**With your help and support, we can and will elect new leadership for our state -- and we will make history by electing the first Black woman to serve as governor nationwide.[Donate now and power my campaign through the final week before the primary.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yItEt7UQpuYeCalSemnTXD-m8piNgU1Gi8bNlAUiDgSeVCd-kr02yXzAIc_wXnZShB4k6NWKfPwieT-4qhfKhT5gJCnirY64jPNnHwsAo8UuZpg8D8zPhJjgkcCG9T51Kc0fcbc1RqKwaxIZo7LvYYxXzjn32-N1mxCUtoC4-uAM6J1b8SCWFrpHck0ifeh03BzqeNPnYUsQ6BvaYaDGOhQGc1TDQYJ3OZzlFEOo4XYyOOjtdZwaDjrnl1qrBt_A0LuzXglxpzbAY4kM-rVOSFNMWQnktQCbcVbQiKn5h5xBeOkrSAP3QF2dGX2O3rg0s/3cf/8NLlT-dWSsOao5Q7tQmwWw/h0/9jElC71G7lJN1Sucg8LAepcOmldYFCHx7Eli1E46XSc)**

To be big and bold, we need to elect a bold new leader who puts Virginia first, not one who is part of the broken status quo. Be big and bold now by donating to this historic campaign.

[DONATE NOW](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yItEt7UQpuYeCalSemnTXD-m8piNgU1Gi8bNlAUiDgSeVCd-kr02yXzAIc_wXnZShB4k6NWKfPwieT-4qhfKhTCpuDUTCiD4sVY0G0mI5MOvyorWYNOpBSodKz1-Lt28xvkkuRKZYFfjcBW5OqAYmb0eyTMfKrEhpU4K8vcai3uIwEFiCL2gTJZFhLc5iz94RZhXqwm8a2vm53FWv5y5lgGa4jNctspcJdm-yfhc6srC6mzVqHDYzZe3a_xZqfbSNeflgSOTWCIa7yVE2h6xx8R0QTOViCj9rocA36kSFu9tPXVs7aiYIPIq3RXJzC3S8/3cf/8NLlT-dWSsOao5Q7tQmwWw/h1/vMUyU7IZb_Uf_GHE32KxHb0sl8pKj-ezQ3k2ItRpCPs)
Let’s go win!

Jennifer

* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. Donate now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_7DmAt5nfMM7QFvx_QNiBNONmVtICnvGiz4ZKs_qG7Zfw4oaKV8pTKPdAsb3VN5_Bh73lWki93nG0RUyySk6zkTRBWLykLOh_ikrEg1x5MMi4VJbfOayeUs13POWrEwPqbewnHZ9VG3lhNv74xF1OLuzAH74QAy6qOqGyrPqmlYYBMhPpo-ARUEOX8FFwpYYT7Ptsk9HYXbu46wyvk-UoY7ijAwSbS4Lh_m-Bd4VuwPIWScOruGnBNfeA7icMN8fVyWjv6tHfW5cNv0mVIlyojJ6om1KYvY5QnZaQF6kMeg/3cf/8NLlT-dWSsOao5Q7tQmwWw/h2/2kuJZdYNFxewW-8QqhUTqIHjpEakgkTrHsG-DHN3cKw)**_ [CONTRIBUTE](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_7DmAt5nfMM7QFvx_QNiBNONmVtICnvGiz4ZKs_qG7Zfw4oaKV8pTKPdAsb3VN5_pXkWAZF1xX_YPR-e_nM-xsMzwmhzFMlK0z2hbrgzKa3kF1Ex05E3D-yk43XXTujftLuVAaz5v73UYW4-CSBAio5zDKmYqXAD61XIqtgKGTA7dBMrnvtyMPkwB4B4JBm50WcEJJF4ePUOUyTQZ8iBu0sKvxb8w4WmNPoFzFszbcmrvyKkinZC5b3pS_lc36Mu0SOTSMrqCpO13ysBngHFv7hNdwZ1npUriwhCNPdDHoA/3cf/8NLlT-dWSsOao5Q7tQmwWw/h3/ilvfdekjtsgIRGkPn00adr99bPUt0gU3W5HiSfgbSHA) | Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor

name: PragerU
subject: BREAKING: Video service refuses to host our videos!
body:
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2dbf74a93f684ce89c016adde5b9c47d&_e=7CixLO8acGD4Xpk4yrWi841W7WzbR2WhnNenBV_YpHNabqNlUMKCkVTM7MwonbPbgqjSVUGwq5rIULuXTJN9PgJl2Jv17Pf329syxGwEMP6jW3GRft1Ea3MvGcuLBkEJ7_rMAq1f6ifYtXKaV1vW1ZezLCjamLUM81wOCQxg2psVeEzCRPpU1tWikhpvgSZqHSLueE2tJcKXL-p1AzMdUnzxsxs5AopLMa97asPCmZ4S-JnpinWKmFC1Gr3mMlN7hsxtT43avyLofaknTVLndYlY0PBseYP382w-ewxL4C_DKN4OQMusJsqMYCRAvnAj) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2dbf74a93f684ce89c016adde5b9c47d&_e=7CixLO8acGD4Xpk4yrWi841W7WzbR2WhnNenBV_YpHNabqNlUMKCkVTM7MwonbPbgqjSVUGwq5rIULuXTJN9PgJl2Jv17Pf329syxGwEMP5f0T_18ydfqdRKwZi-KK5vO_UQmFHbBO0J1kAv7tPEKWHEqZ2lozASF7fz0N_RDWt9nWQGPZM5wsj1WDM4EC0Xqp9u4uFvxJ01LhXHa9-bpnKkUU_EGsmsnLIWwEKpvpdgf0SLMjLXUiSceb9T_v4tidTWV9PPu60QVP2BOv-I08Qds-_DGGfUShHtAXsBKdnkKQhbsCjEtRmrZxRiu499) Despite Big Tech’s relentless censorship campaign against us, PragerU’s ideas will continue to break through and shape millions of young minds. When YouTube began restricting 200+ “dangerous” PragerU videos a few years ago—including our series on The Ten Commandments—we took matters into our own hands and our viewership quadrupled! **Thanks to supporters like you, PragerU had the funding to innovate and build our own streaming infrastructure.** Instead of embedding (often restricted) videos from YouTube on our website, mobile app, and streaming TV channels, we hosted them natively using a video player software company called JW Player. Every time we’ve hit a wall, we’ve been able to find a way around it. But now, we are facing a serious new threat. Just as our contract was coming up for renewal, JW Player informed us they had updated their “community guidelines.” They announced they won’t be renewing our contract as they claim that “PragerU’s content is misleading.” PragerU pressed for more information. Which videos did they feel were misleading? What kind of methods were they using to fact-check information? Is this decision final? In their words: “...the primary basis for our decision was related to the prohibition of misleading content...based on the nature of the violations, I don’t see a viable path forward...” **[Give Today to Help PragerU Gain Independence from Big Tech!](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2dbf74a93f684ce89c016adde5b9c47d&_e=7CixLO8acGD4Xpk4yrWi841W7WzbR2WhnNenBV_YpHNabqNlUMKCkVTM7MwonbPbgqjSVUGwq5rIULuXTJN9PgJl2Jv17Pf329syxGwEMP7no1MjD4Awty9JkdMEthTULNupgf0jJypdc-Gj9vTyGfCET7f2woVqrR3HnRPNch4wDLlwEAaUfJXhHrtZER4J8oWjgJ2S3uphEAaXxrvyxyyJngSZqk2M272TAm8OReMe_tfRuMC8CjkUr3DK8L11AL75Qx0AAzDdvYM0aJ8IXuH83eIPeND1uGxeXFjYKbvD4GXShkmf9Scmcm_XRwbd)** In cowardly fashion, they refused to give specifics and hid behind third party “fact-checkers” to purge PragerU as a client. Meanwhile, JW Player’s current clients include left-wing media outlets like The Young Turks and Vice! These companies produce thousands of videos using politically-charged narratives that divide our country and teach young folks to resent America. clean_body: Despite Big Tech’s relentless censorship campaign against us, PragerU’s ideas will continue to break through and shape millions of young minds. When YouTube began restricting 200+ “dangerous” PragerU videos a few years ago—including our series on The Ten Commandments—we took matters into our own hands and our viewership quadrupled! Thanks to supporters like you, PragerU had the funding to innovate and build our own streaming infrastructure. Instead of embedding (often restricted) videos from YouTube on our website, mobile app, and streaming TV channels, we hosted them natively using a video player software company called JW Player. Every time we’ve hit a wall, we’ve been able to find a way around it. But now, we are facing a serious new threat. Just as our contract was coming up for renewal, JW Player informed us they had updated their “community guidelines.” They announced they won’t be renewing our contract as they claim that “PragerU’s content is misleading.” PragerU pressed for more information. Which videos did they feel were misleading? What kind of methods were they using to fact-check information? Is this decision final? In their words: “...the primary basis for our decision was related to the prohibition of misleading content...based on the nature of the violations, I don’t see a viable path forward...” In cowardly fashion, they refused to give specifics and hid behind third party “fact-checkers” to purge PragerU as a client. Meanwhile, JW Player’s current clients include left-wing media outlets like The Young Turks and Vice! These companies produce thousands of videos using politically-charged narratives that divide our country and teach young folks to resent America. What’s at stake is Freedom of Speech and Freedom of Information. Without these freedoms, the America we love will not exist for our children and grandchildren. Rest assured, we’re already working on a solution to keep our videos online. Now we need your support TODAY to WAKE AMERICA UP to the dangers of online censorship while we develop alternative technologies—for greater independence from Big Tech Tyranny. We cannot do this alone, Your PragerU Team | | Help us fight back against Big Tech censorship. Donate today. Copyright © 2021 PragerU, All rights reserved.

That's why we want to make sure that we acknowledge our sustaining supporters As we get ready to roll out our board of directors and our first slate of candidates, I need your help to meet our fundraising goals so that I can spend my time working directly with the candidates instead of calling donors. = Thanks for all you do, Elisa Cardnell Executive Director = | | | ---|--- Paid for by Elect Grassroots PAC Elect Grassroots PAC PO Box 667253 Houston, TX 77266 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| AN URGENT 2nd AMENDMENT UPDATE FROM ALBANY
Friend,
With just 6 days left in the legislative session, Senate Democrats are rushing through a package of bills to further restrict our 2nd Amendment rights! New York already has the most restrictive gun laws in the nation. Now, Albany progressives want to enact even more policies to erode our constitutional freedoms.
Some of the bills being rushed through today will...
>> add dangerous new wait time restrictions for individuals that have already gone through extensive background checks - including victims of violent crime
>> impose onerous regulations on gun manufacturers
>> further curtail the rights of law abiding gun owners across New York
All of this is being done while Senate Democrats advance dangerous bail reform laws, make murders and rapists eligible for parole, and call for DEFUNDING our police departments.
Crime is on the rise in New York State but law-abiding gun owners are not to blame.
I am asking for your help to defeat these radical politicians. They are fighting to take away your rights; we need to fight to defeat them at the polls.
Please make an urgent contribution to our campaign fund today. All donations will help us defeat these out-of-touch politicians that are taking away your freedoms.

subject: Louis DeJoy still hasn’t quit

body:
Tell him it’s time to resign
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30170648/288703654/-2023814932?refcode=20210602_PO_6E&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Nzc0OWJkZS1mMGMzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kuva778VWe4qbaxw4rQt_pikfPtMI4BWwpcmpAbVXUQ=)

| | Derek,

It’s crazy, but Louis DeJoy is still the Postmaster General. He can only be replaced by a board of directors and that board is still loaded with Donald Trump’s cronies.

So unless DeJoy quits, he’s got the job as long as he wants it.

That’s unacceptable, Derek.

From sabotaging vote by mail for Donald Trump to causing nationwide delays in service, DeJoy has done everything in his power to destroy the Postal Service.

It’s time for him to go and we’re asking you to join us in calling on his resignation today.

**[Will you add your name and demand the resignation of Louis DeJoy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30170649/288703655/-346725468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Nzc0OWJkZS1mMGMzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kuva778VWe4qbaxw4rQt_pikfPtMI4BWwpcmpAbVXUQ=&emci=3e5a37f8-bbc3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=57749bde-f0c3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7540477)**

In 2020, we saw the critical role the Postal Service plays in our everyday lives.

The Postal Service kept our communities (especially our rural communities) connected through the pandemic.

The Postal Service brought groceries, medicine and other vital resources to the folks who need it most.

It’s a vital agency and it’s unacceptable that a wealthy Donald Trump mega-donor is still allowed to run it into the ground.

[**Will you sign on to call on Louis DeJoy to resign from his position as Postmaster General?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30170650/288703656/-346725468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Nzc0OWJkZS1mMGMzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Kuva778VWe4qbaxw4rQt_pikfPtMI4BWwpcmpAbVXUQ=&emci=3e5a37f8-bbc3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=57749bde-f0c3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7540477)

body:
Republicans across the country are trying to rig elections by drawing their own districts and picking their constituents. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30171062/288705025/-1270196415?refcode=EM_FR_210602rig_N_TL_90DA_5_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTk0NWExNi1mMmMzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lfsb9EFz0aOOU314vU7n9gyFLW5-KpeC2q3EGTvzk1Q=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30171063/288705026/-1270196415?refcode=EM_FR_210602rig_N_TL_90DA_5_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTk0NWExNi1mMmMzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lfsb9EFz0aOOU314vU7n9gyFLW5-KpeC2q3EGTvzk1Q=) Peter,

The Wisconsin Assembly just introduced a redistricting bill (AB 369) that would allow the Legislature to redraw ward boundaries after local governments draw them.

They’re trying to pass this quickly so no one notices -- but this is the same game they’ve been playing for years.

Republicans across the country are trying to rig elections by drawing their own districts and picking their constituents. We’ve had enough of these partisan gerrymandering games, and we need someone in the Senate who will support the _For the People Act,_ which will stop gerrymandering at every level of government.

Ron Johnson opposes the _For the People Act_ , and that’s why we need to elect Alex Lasry to the Senate. Eliminating gerrymandering is the only way we can save our democracy.

They’re trying to pass this quickly so no one notices -- but this is the same game they’ve been playing for years. Republicans across the country are trying to rig elections by drawing their own districts and picking their constituents. We’ve had enough of these partisan gerrymandering games, and we need someone in the Senate who will support the For the People Act, which will stop gerrymandering at every level of government. name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Starting Pride Month with a bang 🌈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

LGBTQ Victory Fund just endorsed Malcolm's historic campaign for U.S. Senate!
[Can you make a $3 donation to help us make history by electing Malcolm as the first out gay man and the first LGBTQ person of color to the U.S. Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30171213/288705350/-347207331?refcode2=2d98f83c-f3c3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210602-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDk4ZjgzYy1mM2MzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dqNDJaQGeUSVav4uja4Lk7R9nWNdwCFLD0RsLOWZOb4=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30171214/288705378/-347207331?refcode2=2d98f83c-f3c3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210602-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDk4ZjgzYy1mM2MzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dqNDJaQGeUSVav4uja4Lk7R9nWNdwCFLD0RsLOWZOb4=)**
Happy 🌈 Pride Month,
Team Malcolm
Friend —
Brave LGBTQ activists have organized and fought for decades so that people like my partner Dr. Matt and I can live the American dream with our whole authentic selves.
And as this Pride Month begins, I couldn’t be more honored to receive the endorsement from the only national organization dedicated to electing LGBTQ leaders to public office, LGBTQ Victory Fund.
Our campaign is about bringing together authentic voices from all across Pennsylvania and this country to continue our fight for progress, and I'm so grateful that Victory Fund has joined our coalition.
I believe in my bones that if we're going to win our fight to pass the Equality Act, ban conversion abuse, and break down structures that perpetuate systemic poverty in the LGBTQ community, we need to elect a new generation of leaders who know these struggles first-hand.
That's why I'm running. And if I have the honor of serving Pennsylvania as the first openly gay man and the first LGBTQ person of color in the U.S. Senate, no one will be a louder voice for the issues affecting our community.
[So, friend, in honor of Pride Month, I'm asking you to be a part of our work to build a huge coalition of folks behind our movement. Will you pitch in $3 to help us build a campaign that can win and make history?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30171215/288705379/-347207331?refcode2=2d98f83c-f3c3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210602-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDk4ZjgzYy1mM2MzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dqNDJaQGeUSVav4uja4Lk7R9nWNdwCFLD0RsLOWZOb4=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30171216/288705380/-347207331?refcode2=2d98f83c-f3c3-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210602-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDk4ZjgzYy1mM2MzLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dqNDJaQGeUSVav4uja4Lk7R9nWNdwCFLD0RsLOWZOb4=)**
It means so much to have your support. Thanks for everything you do.
All my best,
Malcolm

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Pride Month is not just a time for celebration, but also for action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer |
body:
Happy Pride Month, Peter!

Pride Month wouldn't be possible without courageous Americans who stood up against oppression and brutality in 1969 at the Stonewall Inn. And Pride Month -- and the progress we have to celebrate -- has grown through leaders like State Senator Emily Randall, our state's amazing Speaker of the House Laurie Jinkins, outstanding local leaders like Pierce County Councilman Ryan Mello and Bremerton City Councilman Michael Goodnow, and so many others who are blazing trails and making a difference!

This Pride Month, as long as you're fully vaccinated, it's safe to gather in person for community events to celebrate these leaders, activists, and the entire LGBTQ+ community. The opportunities for engagement are numerous, and I urge you to participate.

But it's important to remember that Pride Month is not just a time for celebration and commemoration. This year especially, it must be a reminder for us to stay vigilant and take action to protect the rights of the LGBTQ+ community.

According to the Human Rights Campaign, 2021 is already the worst year in recent history for LGBTQ+ rights. State Legislators across the country have waged an all out attack against transgender youth. Additionally, countless transgender people -- most of them Black women -- face violence and harassment every year.

These hateful and horrific laws and actions have no place in our country, and it's on all of us to fight back. I stand in solidarity with the LGBTQ+ community and remain committed to doing everything I can to protect the rights and safety of LGBTQ+ Americans.

This month and every month, I hope you'll join in this fight.

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

This month, join Derek in supporting organizations dedicated to expanding and protecting the rights and liberties of LGBTQ+ Americans. Donate to the Human Rights Campaign today.

DONATE >> https://give.hrc.org/page/62714/donate/1

---------------------------------------------
| Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer |
---------------------------------------------

People for Derek Kilmer
PO Box 1381
Tacoma WA 98402 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/1L2NmGU1JlG8SxABi2_zHmscpzBAswOrl5kH1ANx2Vc=/xC6RjUAiDyol6pWmlTEuXlFLnlOmphmTomG4bl2lBBo=.

body:
Friend, I have some concerning news: We're still 11 responses short of what we need to fight back against the Arizona GOP's sham election audit. Before it's too late: Will you join me now in condemning Republican attempts to overturn the 2020 election?

https://surveys.signforgood.com/lopez-election-audit2?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk96-su-text

Not only are extremist Republicans like Kelli Ward trying to steal the election from President Biden – but they've also hired QAnon-supporting conspiracy theorists to "recount" millions of ballots.
I mean, friend – we just heard their "big strategy" is to look for bamboo in the ballot papers, all because they heard a conspiracy theory that China tried to rig our election for Joe Biden. It's completely ridiculous – but if we don't speak up and call this audit the sham that it is, then the GOP may succeed in casting doubt on President Biden's victory.
That's why I need to hear from you so urgently. Please, we only have a few hours left before we close this poll, so speak out right now:

Will you condemn the Arizona GOP's sham "election audit" and defend our democracy against these baseless, outrageous attacks?

YES https://surveys.signforgood.com/lopez-election-audit2?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk96-su-text
NO https://surveys.signforgood.com/lopez-election-audit2?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk96-su-text

Thank you,
Marco

Friend, this may be the most outrageous attack on our democracy yet.

Extremists in the Arizona GOP – led by Kelli Ward – are currently recounting millions of ballots in a sham "election audit" – all to overturn President Joe Biden's historic victory in Arizona!

Even worse? They've hired a QAnon-supporting, conspiracy theorist group to conduct the recount in secret . Let's be clear: They're not trying to make our elections more secure. They're still trying to push Trump's Big Lie, steal the election from President Biden and rig the system so Democrats can never win in Arizona again. And we need to fight back NOW – or, as Rachel Maddow warns, it could be the END OF DEMOCRACY as we know it.

Democrats across the country are speaking out against this anti-democratic attack on our elections – but we still don't know where you stand, friend. We're counting on another 36 concerned Democrats from 18326 to make their voices heard before tonight's midnight deadline, so please:

WILL YOU CONDEMN THE ARIZONA GOP'S SHAM "ELECTION AUDIT" AND DEFEND OUR DEMOCRACY?

https://surveys.signforgood.com/lopez-election-audit2?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk96-su-text

11:59 P.M. DEADLINE | COMPLETION RATE IN 18326: 99.1%

Your voice is critical in this fight, friend. Thank you.
– Team Lopez

* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.
