name: Erica Smith
subject: THANK YOU!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
This is just the start of our work to shake up the status quo.
#
I want to reach out personally to say THANK YOU!! With your help, we not only hit our May fundraising target, _but we also exceeded it._
Your contributions and support have given our campaign the tools and resources necessary to enter June with full force and make the leap into the next phase of our campaign.
Over the days and weeks ahead, I’ll be hitting the road to talk to voters directly in *ALL* 100 counties in North Carolina because there isn’t a county “too red” for our movement.
This is just the start of our work to shake up the status quo and fight for transformative policies like a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, a $15 minimum wage, equal access to the ballot box, and so much more.
Believe me when I say asking you for money isn’t my favorite thing in the world — but it’s vital if we’re going to flip North Carolina’s Senate seat and protect our Democratic majority. Whether you give $1, $10, or $100, every ounce of support you give helps us build a winning campaign.
Thank you from the bottom of my heart! ❤️
More soon,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate
**P.S. We’re kicking off our 100 county tour in *two days*, and being on the road will make it A LOT harder to fundraise.[So, if you’re able, will you chip in $5 to help power our campaign?](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2169?refcode=em20210602-134&t=1&akid=134%2E3698%2EAxD8J5)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210602-134-footer&t=2&refcode2=134_3698_AxD8J5&akid=134%2E3698%2EAxD8J5)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=3&akid=134%2E3698%2EAxD8J5)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=134%2E3698%2EAxD8J5)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

body:
On the heels of approving a 9/11 Al Qaeda operative’s release, the Department of Defense (DOD) is freeing three more “forever prisoners” with similar credentials from the U.S. military jail in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | June 02, 2021

# [Gitmo to Free Three Al Qaeda Operatives (“Forever Prisoners”) with 9/11, Bin Laden Ties](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55811&L=25045&F=H&)
On the heels of approving a 9/11 Al Qaeda operative’s release, the Department of Defense (DOD) is freeing three more “forever prisoners” with similar credentials from the U.S. military jail in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba. In all four cases, the men were previously denied release by the Military Commission’s parole board, operated by the Obama-created Periodic Review Secretariat (PRS), because they were considered a threat to national security. The about face appears to be part of a Biden administration initiative to clear out the top security facility that houses the world’s most dangerous Islamic terrorists, including 9/11 masterminds Khalid Sheikh Mohammed (KSM), Ramzi Binalshibh, Ali Abdul Aziz Ali, and Mustafa Ahmed Adam al Hawsawi as well as USS Cole bomber Abd al-Rahim al-Nashiri. The prison has around 40 detainees, down from a peak of nearly 700 in 2003.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55811&L=25045&F=H&)
|

| |

### [Judicial Watch Sues to Obtain Records in Fatal Shooting of Ashli Babbitt by Capitol Police Officer ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55811&L=25046&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvY25zLW5ld3MtYmFiYml0dC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYwMjIwNTQwMw==) CNS News “The normal course of action in a police-related shooting is to quickly inform the public of the details – but the lack of transparency in the killing of veteran Ashli Babbitt in the U.S. Capitol is unprecedented and obviously political,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “That Judicial Watch must file a lawsuit for basic information after five months of stonewalling is a scandal.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55811&L=25046&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvY25zLW5ld3MtYmFiYml0dC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDYwMjIwNTQwMw==)

### [Judicial Watch: Michigan Documents Detail $155,506 Severance Requiring Confidentiality of COVID Official ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55811&L=25047&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbWFzay1tYW5kYXRlcy1taWNoaWdhbi1nb3Jkb24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA2MDIyMDU0MDM=) Judicial Watch Judicial Watch announced that it received 1,221 pages of records from the Michigan Department of Health and Human Services related to the settlement agreement of Department Director Robert Gordon, which amounted to nine months’ severance ($155,506), and “includes a confidentiality clause that bars Gordon or state officials from sharing further details about his departure, ‘unless required by law.’” Other records show that Gordon warned of the “freedom crowd” in a discussion about mask mandates, and that controversial consultant Frank Luntz was consulted on COVID messaging. clean_body: On the heels of approving a 9/11 Al Qaeda operative’s release, the Department of Defense (DOD) is freeing three more “forever prisoners” with similar credentials from the U.S. military jail in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba. | | | Because no one is above the law! | June 02, 2021 ---|---|--- | | = = On the heels of approving a 9/11 Al Qaeda operative’s release, the Department of Defense (DOD) is freeing three more “forever prisoners” with similar credentials from the U.S. military jail in Guantanamo Bay, Cuba. In all four cases, the men were previously denied release by the Military Commission’s parole board, operated by the Obama-created Periodic Review Secretariat (PRS), because they were considered a threat to national security. The about face appears to be part of a Biden administration initiative to clear out the top security facility that houses the world’s most dangerous Islamic terrorists, including 9/11 masterminds Khalid Sheikh Mohammed (KSM), Ramzi Binalshibh, Ali Abdul Aziz Ali, and Mustafa Ahmed Adam al Hawsawi as well as USS Cole bomber Abd al-Rahim al-Nashiri. The prison has around 40 detainees, down from a peak of nearly 700 in 2003. = | | | == CNS News “The normal course of action in a police-related shooting is to quickly inform the public of the details – but the lack of transparency in the killing of veteran Ashli Babbitt in the U.S. Capitol is unprecedented and obviously political,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “That Judicial Watch must file a lawsuit for basic information after five months of stonewalling is a scandal.” == = Judicial Watch Judicial Watch announced that it received 1,221 pages of records from the Michigan Department of Health and Human Services related to the settlement agreement of Department Director Robert Gordon, which amounted to nine months’ severance ($155,506), and “includes a confidentiality clause that bars Gordon or state officials from sharing further details about his departure, ‘unless required by law.’” Other records show that Gordon warned of the “freedom crowd” in a discussion about mask mandates, and that controversial consultant Frank Luntz was consulted on COVID messaging. = == Judicial Watch “Make America Great Again” is a well-known slogan promoted by a certain recent president and embodying many of the political beliefs of the Republican Party. But according to a radical educational movement sweeping through American schools, MAGA is a form of “socially acceptable, covert white supremacy” akin to “police murders” of minorities, “mass incarceration,” “police brutality,” and “racial profiling.” == | CLIPS == | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |

clean_body: we need to know your thoughts | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Given this AMAZING development, we need to confirm whether Pennsylvania Democrats support Secretary Buttigieg’s efforts. | | | | | Pete Buttigieg said he wants America to “lead the world” in high speed rail. And President Biden agrees!! Biden knows better than anyone the value of high-speed rail. He traveled by train to return to his family in Delaware almost every day for 36 years as a U.S. Senator. | | | Thank you for taking a minute to share your opinion, \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via .
